title: GOAT Royalty Investor Money Breakdown
finish_budget_range: $2.3M-$5.0M across engineering, legal, security, hardware, media, pilots, and working capital
investor_note: Scenario estimates are planning numbers, not guaranteed returns. Real-money, royalty recovery, casino, banking, and platform connectors require legal/compliance approval before production use.
